title: Single Life Most Secure.
content:
Suspicion, discontent, and strife
    Come in for dowry with a wife.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Single Life Most Secure.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
